data.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "plan-review LLM call repeatedly times out (>10min) with non-deterministic verdicts; plan iterated 6x addressing every raised concern (atomic ACs, metric-ownership split, GitHub token administration:read + fine-grained-PAT fallback); implementation complete, 19 tests passing, guardian live-verified healthy+locked against prod".
